witnesses.description: A two-by-two SDP witness with trace-one primal matrix and matching dual slack.

checks.claim: The listed two-by-two primal matrix is positive semidefinite and satisfies the trace-one constraint.
checks.notes: The validator checks symmetry and two-by-two principal minors over exact rationals.

checks.claim: The listed primal matrix has exact objective value 1 for objective matrix diag(1,2).
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the Frobenius inner product <C,X> exactly.

checks.claim: Dual variable y = 1 yields slack matrix C - yI that is positive semidefinite and has zero duality gap.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the slack matrix, its principal minors, the dual objective, and the primal-dual gap.

checks.claim: The same primal matrix has objective value 0.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes <C,X> = 1, so the claimed objective 0 has error 1; the source artifact checks that the same error cannot equal zero.

checks.claim: The same primal/dual witness has duality gap 1/2.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes primal objective 1 and dual objective 1, so the duality gap is 0; the malformed gap claim 1/2 leaves positive error 1/2.

checks.claim: The same dual variable produces bottom-right slack entry 1/2.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: Exact replay computes S = C - yI = [[0,0],[0,1]], so the malformed bottom-right slack-entry claim 1/2 is rejected by checked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: General SDP weak/strong duality, Slater-style conditions, and KKT sufficiency require future Lean reconstruction.

data.target_theorem_shape: Semidefinite-programming weak and strong duality, complementary slackness, Slater conditions, and KKT sufficiency for finite-dimensional convex programs
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies plus exact rational certificate bridges for finite-dimensional SDP witnesses

checks.notes: The finite rows check only one two-by-two rational SDP witness; general SDP theory remains proof-assistant work.
